character.description: olive-green goblin raider with skull shoulder guard and curved sword, facing left

idle.action: subtle combat breathing and one blink; keep both feet planted and the curved sword stable; final frame returns close to the first

attack.action: readable curved-sword attack: compact windup, horizontal slash, follow-through, recovery toward combat idle; body and sword only, no detached effects

hurt.action: brief impact recoil: flinch backward, stagger, regain footing, settle toward combat idle; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, identical proportions, outline weight, detail density, palette, green skin, tusks, skull shoulder guard, leather gear, and curved sword
